Find out what he knew and who closed that estate so quickly after his death. If the documents he was managing connect to what we found in Aldermoor, that is not coincidence.

directive.label: // DIRECTOR'S NOTE — INITIAL
paragraphs: The grant source is the same shell company structure we found in Aldermoor. Either this is a coincidence or someone is funding environments where the boundary between the living and the dead is thin.
Three people have lost themselves. The remaining understudies may be next. Get eyes on this before the weekend — there's a performance on Saturday.
directive.dim_note: // I want to know if the actors chose this or if it was done to them. — Director
